LecturerIntroduction.name: Jon will also support you with free online 1-1 coaching!
LecturerIntroduction.description: Originally from the UK, Jon currently lectures on global business skills at Hitotsubashi University. After coming to Japan in 1990, he taught international business communication skills as a cross-cultural business instructor at major training companies, and then in media/marketing companies. He established the training and consulting company J-Global Co., Ltd. in 2010. Utilizing his extensive business experience in Japan, he has provided services to over 100 Japanese and foreign companies. We offer bilingual workshops in Japanese/English with the aim of spreading the "J-Global" best-mix way of working, which combines the strengths of Japanese and other countries.' business styles
LecturerIntroduction.description2: We will discuss your career path ideas together in a relaxing 20 minute conversation while creating a mind map to visually and logically show your thoughts. Either Japanese or English is OK, and you can enjoy this service whether or not you decide to participate in our programs.
LecturerIntroduction.coachingSupport: Jon will also support you with free online 1-1 coaching!
LecturerIntroduction.bookCoaching: Book a free online 1-1 coaching session!
LecturerIntroduction.otherLectures: In addition, instructors with specialized knowledge will support you!

intro.text: Unlock your global business potential with flexible, interactive, and certified workshops.

content.list_item_1: Join 20+ bilingual one-hour workshops weekly, offered morning, afternoon, and evening (Japan time).
content.list_item_2: Programs cover practical global business topics in 2–4 workshops you can attend in any order.
content.list_item_3: Major courses like the Mini MBA include 6 programs and 24 workshops over six months.
content.list_item_4: Every session is interactive, live, and bilingual, with attendance tracking, digital badges, and certificates.

intro.p1_part3: are designed to be fun, interactive, and impactful, with friendly facilitators and a "no wrong answers" approach. Participants can speak freely in
intro.p2_part1: Before joining, learners can watch short videos or readings and complete a needs and goals survey to personalize their experience. After class, participants record their progress and apply what they learned through a

programsSectionSubtitle: Three levels of global skill learning
mainTitle: Skills that move careers in <blue>Japan's global economy.</blue>
reason: Built by practitioners with 15+ years of cross-cultural consulting across 100+ Japanese and international companies.
skillsReasonablePrice: Effective skills at a reasonable price
skillsReasonablePriceDescription: World-class intercultural and leadership training at a fraction of traditional MBA costs. From ¥8,000/month on the annual plan — and a free two-week trial to start with no card needed.
customizedLearning: Customized to suit your learning needs
customizedLearningDescription: Not a one-size-fits-all course. Start with a personal coaching session to map a path through the 175+ workshops that matches your actual career goals and schedule.
interculturalMindset: Intercultural mindset to boost your career
interculturalMindsetDescription: Our “J-Global best-mix” approach fuses the strengths of Japanese and overseas business styles — giving you the edge whether you work in a Japanese firm or a global MNC in Japan.
achievementsDescription: J-Global, the company that provides this program, has received high acclaim for its consulting and globalization workshops for over 100 Japanese companies.
achievementsSection1: Over the years,J-Global has learned how companies and people can achieve global transformation. And now, we share that knowledge with you through our workshops and e-learning.
achievementsSection2: Our mission is to help Japan-based companies change cross-cultural business practices and support global business development.
achievementsSection3: By fusing the strengths of Japanese and overseas work styles, we support the construction of highly functional and diverse teams, laying the foundation for sustainable global growth.
miniMBADescription: This Mini-MBA, which can be completed in as little as six months, will equip you with global business knowledge plus how Japanese business differs, and cover all the key topics included in a full MBA.
miniMBAAddition: In addition to each topic, there are also role-playing games and mini internships, allowing you to learn in a fun and practical way.
